mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, parent_id, suite_code, suite_name, icon, description, status, sort_order, options, del_flag, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time

SELECT s.id AS id, s.parent_id AS parentId, s.suite_code AS suiteCode, s.suite_name AS suiteName, s.icon AS icon, s.description AS description, s.status AS status, s.sort_order AS sortOrder, s.options AS options, COALESCE(o.object_count, 0) AS objectCount, COALESCE(a.app_count, 0) AS appCount, COALESCE(a.enabled_app_count, 0) AS enabledAppCount, CASE WHEN a.latest_app_update IS NULL THEN s.update_time WHEN a.latest_app_update > s.update_time THEN a.latest_app_update ELSE s.update_time END AS latestUpdateTime, s.create_time AS createTime, s.update_time AS updateTime FROM ai_business_suite s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, suite_code, COUNT(1) AS object_count FROM ai_business_object WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY tenant_id, suite_code ) o ON o.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND o.suite_code = s.suite_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, suite_code, COUNT(1) AS app_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS enabled_app_count, MAX(update_time) AS latest_app_update FROM ai_business_app WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY tenant_id, suite_code ) a ON a.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND a.suite_code = s.suite_code
mapper.select: ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.id ASC
ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.id ASC

SELECT s.id AS id, s.parent_id AS parentId, s.suite_code AS suiteCode, s.suite_name AS suiteName, s.icon AS icon, s.description AS description, s.status AS status, COALESCE(o.object_count, 0) AS objectCount, COALESCE(a.app_count, 0) AS appCount, COALESCE(a.enabled_app_count, 0) AS enabledAppCount, CASE WHEN a.latest_app_update IS NULL THEN s.update_time WHEN a.latest_app_update > s.update_time THEN a.latest_app_update ELSE s.update_time END AS latestUpdateTime FROM ai_business_suite s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, suite_code, COUNT(1) AS object_count FROM ai_business_object WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY tenant_id, suite_code ) o ON o.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND o.suite_code = s.suite_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, suite_code, COUNT(1) AS app_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS enabled_app_count, MAX(update_time) AS latest_app_update FROM ai_business_app WHERE del_flag = '0' GROUP BY tenant_id, suite_code ) a ON a.tenant_id = s.tenant_id AND a.suite_code = s.suite_code WHERE s.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND s.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.id ASC
